features: Effective Skin Moisturizer: Vaseline Original Petroleum Jelly provides intense hydration and locks in moisture to keep skin soft and smooth.
Relieves Dry & Cracked Skin: Ideal for dry, cracked, and rough skin, helping to restore skin's natural barrier and prevent further damage.
Eczema Relief: Helps soothe and heal irritated skin caused by eczema, providing long-lasting comfort and protection.
Versatile & Multipurpose: Can be used on the body, face, hands, lips, and other areas needing extra moisture and care.
description: Vaseline Original Petroleum Jelly is a trusted solution for dry and cracked skin, offering intense hydration to restore moisture and soothe irritation. Ideal for people with dry skin or eczema, this petroleum jelly forms a protective barrier to lock in moisture and promote healing. The versatile formula can be applied to various areas of the body, including hands, lips, and face, making it a must-have for year-round skin care. Each pack contains three 250 ml jars, providing long-lasting hydration for the whole family. Use daily for soft, smooth, and healthy-looking skin.
